nasb.text: In that day the Lord of hosts will become a beautiful crown And a glorious diadem to the remnant of His people;

esv.text: In that day the Lord of hosts will be a crown of glory, and a diadem of beauty, to the remnant of his people,

cnv.text: 到那日， 萬軍之耶和華必作他餘民榮耀的冠冕、美麗的華冠，

ccb.text: 到那日，万军之耶和华必做祂余民的荣冠和华冕。

csbs.text: 到那日， 万军之耶和华对他的余剩之民， 必成为华美荣耀的冠冕；
